NVDA ER - Intraday post (26/Feb)

Weekly post:

Steep long iron fly spread | Weekly post (23-27/Feb)

Python quant course is already available on my Substack-site, by an ex-Wall Street quant.

On Monday, I dropped a very important free post about Iran and why Trump put himself into a lose-lose situation. Very important piece:

Iran-risk and oil prices

Bitcoin post and AI posts are coming soon.

NVDA ER I dropped a thread on twitter where I dissect the report a bit more. I will drop a detailed version of it soon here.

Like and share…

ES showed strenght during overnight session by holding above 6940. However, despite the superficially good earnings, volume is decreasing. Watch 6960/65 as pivot.

ES showed strenght during overnight session by holding above 6940. However, despite the superficially good earnings, volume is decreasing. Watch 6960/65 as pivot.

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Speed profile is net positive, customers are flat-to-buying downside vol and selling upside vol.

Centroid is at 6967.35. this is a locally sticky range (pin at 6955)

Downside pivot is at 6927.35target is 6866.31, Here, the spot is expected to be sticky towards 6880 or 60s area. Left-tail scenario is 6821.5 , but market is betting on a brake towards the target. Locally 6890/6900 is also a support.

Upside pivot is at 6985.22target is 7003.59Target is very magnetic, but spot needs call IV bid otherwise it will be rejected by heavy local gamma hedging.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
